    [Documentation](https://www.notion.so/2189b97b4888803dbbdcef264e7eff58)[Privacy Policy](https://www.kakao.com/policy/privacy?lang=en)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#a8d8c4c9d1c5cbd8e8c3c9c3c9c7cbc7dad886cbc7c5)
    

Add a variety of servers registered in PlayMCP, including Kakao services, to your toolbox and use them through Claude.

You can use PlayMCP to:

**Service Discovery:**"What Kakao services are available through PlayMCP?"

**Tool Integration:**"Connect my PlayMCP tools to this workflow"

**Service Access:**"Use the registered Kakao service to complete this task"
